sourceTitle: Generative AI in T&L at the University of Melbourne
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Student use of these tools may pose risks to academic integrity, and staff should consider and provide advice on the limits of acceptable use in their subject. Use of these tools can easily extend to the point where students are no longer expressing their own ideas or understanding of the subject matter.
evidenceLocator: Section: AI and assessment, subsection: Is it okay if students use GenAI for language translation or editing their work?
